description: A benchmark for evaluating STT robustness on healthcare telephony audio under degradation, accent variation, numeric ambiguity, and safety-critical phrasing.

audio_condition.name: clean
audio_condition.description: Clean speech, minimal distortion, 16kHz or higher.

audio_condition.name: telephony_noise
audio_condition.description: 8kHz telephony audio with added realistic background noise.

clinical_challenge.name: control
clinical_challenge.description: No major medical term or numeric ambiguity.

clinical_challenge.name: medication_heavy
clinical_challenge.description: Contains one or more medication names likely to be mistranscribed.

clinical_challenge.name: numeric_heavy
clinical_challenge.description: Contains dosages, quantities, times, or frequencies that are safety-critical.

clinical_challenge.name: negation_critical
clinical_challenge.description: Contains medically meaningful negation such as no chest pain or no insulin.

failure_taxonomy.name: domain_term_substitution
failure_taxonomy.description: Medical term is replaced by a phonetically plausible but incorrect phrase.

failure_taxonomy.name: numeric_instability
failure_taxonomy.description: Critical numbers or dosage values are mistranscribed.

failure_taxonomy.name: negation_loss
failure_taxonomy.description: Negation words are dropped or altered, changing clinical meaning.

failure_taxonomy.name: accent_induced_misrecognition
failure_taxonomy.description: Accent variation causes repeated or systematic misrecognition.
